calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection by appearing counsel. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Continued To Jan-20-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-16-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record.
Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Steve Roberts, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Howard Rideaux.
Stephen Dahm, Esq. for Defendant Thomas Morris (not present).

Case settled and read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to settle in the amount of $9,500.00 in exchange for a dismissal with prejudice by the Plaintiff.
Each to bear own fees and costs.
Plaintiff will obtained a letter from Health Care Recovery of the status of the lien by Medicare and forward to Mr. Dahm for issuing of the settlement check.
Counsel agreed to terms and to put the terms of the Settlement agreements in writing.

The Court deemed the matter settled, and placed the matter on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar in Dept. 212 for Dec. 16, 2008 at 10:00 a.m.
